name: GO Reporting / SaaS
description: GO Reporting voice-to-report tool completion, SaaS expansion strategy, club freemium model, and coach onboarding design.

actions.task: Document outcomes from development expert meeting — scope, timeline, cost, realistic complexity
Decision — launch with basic reporting tool only, or hold until broader SaaS features ready
Complete GO Reporting web app to commercial standard — target April 2026
Scott capacity planning — map GO Reporting completion against Everfit enterprise build timeline
Confirm Crystal Yeo scope — does her role include input on GO Reporting product design?
Draft club affiliate agreement terms for freemium access to GO Reporting (add to Sprintlaw brief)
Design coach onboarding flow for GO Reporting
Define SaaS expansion roadmap (Phase 2 and Phase 3) — post development expert meeting

ideas: GO Reporting + SaaS expansion elevates GO from 'a parent app' to 'the operating system for gymnastics clubs and families'
Start with freemium (Option A) to rapidly acquire affiliates, transition to paid as platform expands
Full SaaS scope is a 3-12 month build — today's expert meeting determines the entire club launch strategy
